title: Email tracking and automations
excerpt:

posts.author: Euman (Erik Emanuelsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We want to use mass emails as a first step when contacting leads. Is there a way to create a board and/or activity that lists all leads that have opened or clicked in a mass email? I haven’t been able to figure out an automation that pulls out email data/activity.

Ideally we would like to have the email status (delivered, opened, clicked) as a column on the leads board.

Also, is there a way to get emails (mass email or not) into the activity board on Monday CRM?

Thanks a lot!

Erik

posts.author: cstorer (cstorer@aircarehealth.com)
posts.cookedHtml: +1! This is a must to be able to track mass email engagement and performance, and further target individuals based on this opens and link clicks.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Euman @cstorer if you are open for marketplace apps, I can suggest Supermail who offers this functionality:
https://monday.com/marketplace/10000247
